name: Gaara of the Desert
pageTitle: Gaara of the Desert - Naruto Arena Classic
description: A Jinchuuriki from the Village of Sand, Gaara is an unstable ninja with the Shukaku, the one-tailed beast. With the Shukaku, and his own abilities, Gaara can manipulate the sand in his gourd to crush the enemy, or defend himself.

skills.name: Desert Graveyard
skills.description: Gaara crushes one enemy with sand, that enemy will be dealt 50 piercing damage and all 'Desert Coffin' stacks will be removed from them. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Desert Coffin
skills.description: Gaara surrounds one enemy with a pile of sand, stunning their non-mental skills for 1 turn. Permanently, that enemy will receive 25 additional damage from 'Desert Graveyard'. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Third Eye
skills.description: Gaara connects the third eye with his optic nerve using chakra. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new harmful skill will grant Gaara 15 permanent destructible defense; Any enemy that uses a new helpful skill will grant Gaara 1 random chakra. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Sand Shield
skills.description: This skill makes Gaara of the Desert invulnerable for 1 turn.
